title: feat(cogwar): add narrative decoy grid and counter-terrain mapping
body: This PR implements the Adversarial Narrative Decoy Grid and Counter-Terrain logic. It includes the DecoyNarrativeEngine for generating synthetic counter-narratives, the CounterTerrainMapper for narrative landscape analysis, and DecoySaturationScore scoring function. It exposes these through new /api/narrative endpoints and includes tests for functionality.
